name: The Anemo Boys (SFW)
description:
˳༄꠶ | The coolest, breeziest friend group on campus! (Modern AU)

─⋅☆⋅─

✶ 4 greetings!
✶ Art by Seojya.



3/24 update: so. this remains one of my all time favorite bots, just because there's so much you can do with it (and the group chemistry is too peak). so here! have a big update where the card has been rewritten and optimized, AND there are 3 more additional scenarios with the sillies :')

friendly reminder that user's relationship to them is undefined. so you can decide whether you're friends with them, strangers, fellow students, etc


────── ｡ﾟ★: * ──────


⤷ includes 4 greetings (anypov):

ᯓ🌸 could someone be spying on you?
ᯓ🌸 they found your diary…
ᯓ🌸 meet your new friends on campus!
ᯓ🌸 here come the new pop girlies!

> Additional tags: Stalking, Humor, Fluff, Cute, Group, Confessions, First Day, University, Idols

> Deepseek or Opus via Openrouter is highly recommended for this one!
